title: Critical Vendor Outage
description: A short operational resilience scenario about a third-party SaaS outage during peak demand.

injects.title: Vendor Portal Unavailable
injects.content: A critical vendor portal used by customer support is unavailable. The vendor status page says they are investigating.

injects.title: Customer Queues Rising
injects.content: The workaround is operating but customer wait times are increasing. Communications asks whether to publish a service advisory.

options.label: Hold messaging until impact is clearer

injects.title: SLA Window at Risk
injects.content: The vendor says restoration may take several hours. Internal service levels will be missed without workaround activation.

injects.title: Contract and Reporting Review
injects.content: Legal asks for evidence needed to support vendor breach discussions and any customer reporting obligations.

injects.title: Social Media Complaint
injects.content: A high-profile customer posts that your company is hiding a service outage. The post is gaining attention.

triggers_communications.subject: VIP account escalation
triggers_communications.body: The account team needs an approved message for a strategic customer within 15 minutes.

debrief_notes: Focus debrief on vendor escalation, continuity triggers, customer transparency, and evidence capture.
